replies.msg:
Concept野入左腦日日用好少唔記得 唔記得多數係syntex 唔寫一排真係可以連for loop個syntex都可以唔記得
其實concept基本上就係喺適當嘅時候要用適當嘅 data structures 例如要知幾時用list幾時用dictionary幾時用array heap etc
再深入d就係OOP, system design 寫code要講scalability 可以重用 咁以後就可以慳左好多功夫
最後就係唔知嘅tools同library 呢樣就要學識睇 documentation同要識google

replies.msg:
bill gates成功係因為做生意掂 唔係因為寫program叻
樓主問點學coding又唔係問點做生意

要寫出好質素code 最重要係了解你段code背後做緊咩 即係好嘅algorithm
algorithm通常要有data structure配合
有人會將data structure abstract做object 配合一系列OOP concept 主要方便多人合作 等其他人都可以容易加野上去

不過依家多數所謂programming都係鳩call library 用framework 根本無咗對要解決個問題嘅思考

bill gates coding 唔勁？
Your average smartphone has 16 GB storage.
That is (roughtly) 16,000 MB.
Which is roughly 16′000,000 KB
To put it in more pesrpective, your average low-res picture could be 200KB.
Bill had 4 KB available OVER ALL, and he built a complete programming language for it. BASIC was fully functional, easy to use, and opened the world of programming for the non-technical (or less-technical) people.
My point being is, your flashlight has more power than an Altair. And Bill built BASIC for it. He transported it in paper tape. And it worked.
Whomever denies Bill’s coder capabilies is simply delusional.

bill gates coding 唔勁？
Your average smartphone has 16 GB storage.
That is (roughtly) 16,000 MB.
Which is roughly 16′000,000 KB
To put it in more pesrpective, your average low-res picture could be 200KB.
Bill had 4 KB available OVER ALL, and he built a complete programming language for it. BASIC was fully functional, easy to use, and opened the world of programming for the non-technical (or less-technical) people.
My point being is, your flashlight has more power than an Altair. And Bill built BASIC for it. He transported it in paper tape. And it worked.
Whomever denies Bill’s coder capabilies is simply delusional.
